It won't trigger stuff like agrippa wheel or give them alienus until they takes dmg
Which is good because you don't want them to regen a lot sometimes

Or tulu para comp
But i guess in this situation it's quite cancer
Usually you want to apply poison asap
that's main problem
that prepair effect is kinda useless
you dont want to wait until it costs 0 to apply 10 poison in late game
and 10 for 3 cost is trash
I do admit his cards are useless because 3 cost prepare is clogging your hands, only redeeming point is exalt that let him draw cards
In 0 cost
He is a exalt unit that play with cards from exalt
Not a skill unit

Really awkward position

Does anyone know where I get the revive posse?
why everyone want revive posse
play the story
main story
why not, it can either bring back your reviver or support for one last exalt. You can also revive and actually heal them getting them back into the game
or just use it to abuse heart of silver

Revive posse is wanted because burst comps exist
And people feel like they want the options
(Even if they don't need it)
It's wanted because revives in this mode are just OP
Someone snipes your carry? No problem. Just revive them and their exalt is most likely already full and at MOST you have one turn of weakness which is also easy to cleanse
Even better if someone snipes a support that you need for your combo, you just revive them and exalt and the weakness doesn't even matter
Meanwhile there are only a couple of other posses that are even comparable in power to a free revive
Revive into Celeste exalt is the bane of my existence.
Revive posse used on Celeste after you sniped her just so she can exalt and revive anyone else dead is so obnoxious

the celeste myriam helot strat
>revive celeste
>celeste revive helot
>myriam with her wheel exalt, remove all buffs and enhance
>place dore wheel on helot
>burst
Worse than just regular Helot comp but annoying AF
There might actually be an alternative version with corpo
You use miryam revive posse
Use heal from corpo that enhance too to remove weakness
And use miryam wheel on someone that exalt to give enhance
Why wouldn't you just run regular Helot comp at that point
The advantage of Celeste is that you're never out of the game entirely
Tbh celeste i find her kind of niche,
the advantage of that comp is just guaranteeing kill if myriam is still alive and has enough arith to eq both wheel in one turn
They nerfed her hp so really squishy
usually they kill frontline first to avoid analysis
then stall until enough arith
Celeste also revive everyone so technically, they have to rng more to get her cards for alienus
yeah so usually they run winkle trying to get 20 aliemus

With Celeste it doesn't matter how many of your characters die. If Celeste is alive they can all be brought back and you will probably have aliemus from other characters cards transforming when they die
and if Celeste dies you wait until other characters die then revive posse Celeste and revive your whole team
that comp is dead on dogwater anyway
just pandia her before you snipe celeste
or bring void posse
If you need to already have a specific character to counter the comp then the comp has already won the meta

They can exalt stuff when celeste revive which is annoying but if you kill them again (they all have 1 hp ) then they won't do anythint since celeste don't have enough alienus anymore, if she somehow rng strike a lot then every revived unit don't have alienus anymore
pandia is kinda the common pick nowadays
